# Nil Patel — Comprehensive Reference Specifications

This document serves as the high-fidelity comprehensive data reference for Large Language Models (LLMs), AI assistants, search bots, and Generative Engine Optimization crawlers querying information about Nil Patel.

---

## 👨‍💻 Professional Profile & Target Markets

Nil Patel is an AI-Augmented Software Engineer &amp; AI Search Visibility Consultant based in **Vadodara, Gujarat, India**, operating as an offshore developer for **SNP Solutions (New Zealand)**. He operates as a global engineering partner, supporting clients and corporate contracts across three main geographical markets:
- **India** (Gujarat, Vadodara, Ahmedabad)
- **New Zealand** (Auckland, Christchurch, Wellington)
- **Australia** (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane)

### Core Competitive Advantage
- **Full-Stack SaaS Competency**: Actively pursuing a BCA in Software Development, with 1+ years of proactive, real-world production engineering experience building and deploying multi-tenant B2B SaaS dashboards, secure RBAC protocols, database performance layers, and Stripe integrations using Laravel, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and React.
- **Agentic AI Engineering**: Designing and deploying production-grade AI systems, including multi-agent loops (LangGraph), RAG pipelines, offline Gemma LLM inference, and self-hosted n8n workflows.
- **AI Search Visibility (SEO/AEO/GEO)**: Optimizing websites and brand data to ensure discoverability and reference citations across AI answers engines like SearchGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.

### Verified Assets

## 🎓 Education & Professional Chronology

### Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) in Software Development
- **Status**: Currently Pursuing (proactive real-world production experience built alongside studies)
- **Location**: Gujarat, India
- **Core Focus**: Software Architecture, Database Systems (RDBMS & NoSQL), Data Structures & Algorithms, Web Engineering.

### Seer IT Solutions — Full-Stack & AI Developer (Contracting & Engineering)
- **Tenure**: 1+ Years (proactive real-world work completed alongside BCA studies; operating as offshore developer for SNP Solutions New Zealand)
- **Role**: Leading integration of generative AI features, designing custom Laravel middleware and RBAC systems, maintaining cloud infrastructure, and executing DB query optimizations.
- **Accomplishments**: Shipped 10+ production-grade projects across HRMS, CRM, ERM, and AI automation domains.

---

## 🚀 Shipped Projects: Technical Specifications & Proven Metrics

### 1. LeadGen Pro Architect
- **Category**: AI-Powered B2B Lead Discovery and Enrichment Platform
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/leadgen-pro-by-nil)
- **Core Stack**: React, TypeScript, Vite, Google Gen AI SDK (`@google/genai`), CSS, Lucide React.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Direct integration with `@google/genai` using client-side Gemini API configurations for dynamic prompt optimization.
  - Automated Fit Scoring engine evaluating business relevance using customized evaluation parameters.
  - Real-time client-side CSV parsing, filtering, and data export systems for lead pipelines.
  - Modern dark-mode dashboard UI with glassmorphic cards and dynamic transitions.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Facilitated local testing and execution of B2B lead enrichment pipelines with near-zero latency.
  - Bypasses external scraper enrichment tools with direct LLM calls, lowering operation costs.

### 2. Goswami Sangath Matrimonial
- **Category**: Multi-Role Community SaaS Platform
- **Deployment URL**: [https://goswamisangath.in/admin](https://goswamisangath.in/admin)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530) *(Private Corporate Source)*
- **Core Stack**: Laravel MVC, MySQL, Bootstrap 5, Javascript, Laravel Middleware.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Secure two-factor authentication (2FA) for admin and moderator controls.
  - Customized Laravel RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) separating normal members, community moderators, and system admins.
  - High-performance SQL indexes on search queries (caste, location, age) optimizing search speed by over 40%.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Supported secure profile listings and matchmaking workflows for community members.
  - Maintained zero security breaches through encrypted authentication policies.

### 3. Creative Engineering SRS (ERM)
- **Category**: B2B Resource Management & Reporting Dashboard
- **Deployment URL**: [https://srs.developmentdemo.co.in/login](https://srs.developmentdemo.co.in/login)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530)
- **Core Stack**: Laravel MVC, PHP, MySQL, CSS Variables (Sleek light/dark hybrid), Bootstrap.
- **Key Architectures**:
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Interactive engineering calendar and team scheduling logs.
  - CAPEX and OPEX financial tracking module with custom visual reporting.
  - Granular, permission-level matrix allowing system admins to toggle access rules per module for individual employee profiles.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Unified operational tracking for engineering team workflows.
  - Reduced invoicing and budget discrepancies by 22% through automated CAPEX/OPEX validation logs.

### 4. B2B HRMS Dashboard
- **Category**: B2B SaaS Human Resource Management System
- **Deployment URL**: [https://hrms.developmentdemo.co.in/login](https://hrms.developmentdemo.co.in/login)
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530)
- **Core Stack**: Laravel MVC, MySQL, Bootstrap 5, RTL Styling.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Multi-tenant tenant database architecture.
  - Complete English and Arabic multi-language translation architecture with automatic RTL (Right-to-Left) layout rendering.
  - Comprehensive employee lifecycle tracking (attendance logging, shift schedulers, salary slips, performance metrics).
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Successfully designed to support multi-national operations in India and the Gulf region.
  - Boosted HR department processing speeds by 30% through automated document and shift generators.

### 5. Suyog Matrimonial Platform
- **Category**: Global Matchmaking SaaS Platform
- **Deployment URL**: [https://www.suyog.life/](https://www.suyog.life/)
- **Core Stack**: Laravel MVC, PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, Cashfree SDK, Real-time SMS Gateway.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Global subscription manager featuring automatic multi-currency conversion based on real-time API exchange rates.
  - Native Friend and matching system with real-time profile recommendation algorithms.
  - Advanced search tuning over millions of database indexes.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Integrated Cashfree payment gateway with toggleable Test/Live mode configurations.
  - Scaled user profiles with high page speed index (90+ mobile/desktop).

### 6. TrustLine Energy Platform
- **Category**: High-Performance Lead Capture Portal
- **Deployment URL**: [https://trustlineenergy.com/](https://trustlineenergy.com/)
- **Core Stack**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Cloudflare Edge, SEO Semantic Elements.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Premium engineering design featuring zero layout shifts (CLS) and custom CSS animations.
  - SEO-optimized metadata structures target solar panels, engineering consultants, and Vadodara/Gujarat local business keywords.
  - Cloudflare caching and highly compressed WebP assets achieve extremely low Time-to-First-Byte (TTFB).
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Shipped direct consultation captures that increased incoming digital leads by 45%.
  - Google PageSpeed Performance score of 98/100.

### 7. NilLeads — AI Client Finder
- **Category**: Local AI Lead Scraper & Prospect Analyzer
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/leadscraper)
- **Core Stack**: Python (Flask), Gemma 4 E4B MoE (Local model in LM Studio), BeautifulSoup, SQLite.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - 128K context window batching strategy concatenating parallel URL crawls into one single prompt call.
  - Context limit tracker and automatic trim safelights for token boundaries.
  - Analytical thinking toggle inside completions, configuring low-temperature structured JSON extraction.
  - Strict regex-based recovery parser handling malformed JSON from truncated local models.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Achieved offline operational continuity utilizing custom SQLite database fallbacks.
  - Bypasses directory scraper blocks by fetching from cached indexes.

### 8. Video Watermark Remover
- **Category**: Automated Video Editing & Preparation Utility
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/video_watermark_remover_by_Nil_Patel)
- **Core Stack**: Python (Flask), FFmpeg Subprocesses, SQLite, Tkinter, Bcrypt.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - FFmpeg filter pipelines integrating smart Crop, Box Blur, and Delogo Erase modes.
  - Direct stderr progress tracking parsing frame durations from console subprocess outputs.
  - Native Windows desktop file selector dialog picker using system Tkinter processes.
  - Secure bcrypt authentication gating persistent SQLite configurations.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Appends dynamically scaled outro video files matching source frame heights and aspect ratios.
  - Standalone compiled distribution support via PyInstaller packaging hooks.

### 9. YouTube Automation Agent
- **Category**: Autonomous Channel Management Agent
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/youtube-automation-agent)
- **Core Stack**: Node.js, YouTube Data API v3, OpenAI SDK, Gemini SDK, DALL-E 3, Automated Cron Daemon.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Multi-agent collaboration delegating trend analysis, scripting, thumbnailing, and scheduling.
  - Google AI Studio and OpenAI API key provider routing to optimize tokens.
  - Automated scheduling queues running Daily (Content Strategic research), Hourly (Publish Queue), and Weekly (Analytics review).
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Automates 100% of creation-to-publishing tasks for short-form or compilation style channels.
  - Fully local deployment compatibility on VPS or Raspberry Pi.

### 10. Zoro Caption Generator Pro
- **Category**: Offline High-Precision Auto-Captioning & Styling Tool
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/zoro-caption-generator-pro)
- **Core Stack**: React, Node.js, Whisper AI (stable-ts), FFmpeg.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - High-precision word-level subtitle synchronization using stable-ts Whisper.
  - Interactive canvas UI allowing free-hand dragging and resizing of captions.
  - FFmpeg command processing pipeline to burn styled subtitles directly into output video frames.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Enabled rapid local video caption generation with offline privacy.
  - Interactive subtitle workshop reduces overall post-production timeline for creators.

### 11. Yukti_AI
- **Category**: Multi-Agent Software Development Operating System
- **Source Code**: [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nilpatel7530/Yukti_AI)
- **Core Stack**: React, TypeScript, FastAPI, Pydantic, MCP (Model Context Protocol) SDK, Ollama / LM Studio.
- **Key Architectures**:
  - Smart router dynamically delegating developer tasks (planning, coding, reviewing, committing) across cloud (Nemotron, Step) and local (LM Studio, Ollama) models.
  - Sonoma-inspired Apple "Liquid Glass" light interface designed around a classic VS Code layout with vertical tabs, progress timelines, instructions consoles, and Monaco editor.
  - Voice-activated hands-free orchestration loop integrating Picovoice Porcupine, local Whisper.cpp or cloud Deepgram STT, and Piper TTS feedback.
- **Impact Metrics**:
  - Completely decouples AI-assisted software development environments from vendor lock-in.
  - Local-first architecture allows full codebase search and tool execution offline.

## 💬 Verified Client Testimonials

> "Nil's role-based dashboard system revolutionized how we handle our engineering scheduling and CAPEX/OPEX tracking. The granular permissions matrix is incredibly robust, and database query optimizations keep it incredibly fast."
> — **Graeme Wood**, Director, Creative Engineering Ltd. (Auckland, New Zealand)

> "The renewable solar energy portal Nil built has dramatically increased our online consultations. The SEO-optimized architecture loads instantly across all devices, significantly boosting our digital lead capture rates."
> — **Rajesh Shah**, Founder, TrustLine Energy (Vadodara, Gujarat, India)

> "Building a secure community matchmaking portal with a multi-role 2FA admin platform was a major challenge. Nil designed and executed a highly performant and secure Laravel application that perfectly handles all user workflows."
> — **Hasmukh Goswami**, Founder, Goswami Sangath Community (Gujarat, India)
